title: carissa stolonifera
intro: Carissa stolonifera, also known as the num-num or carissa, is a flowering plant native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Carissa stolonifera include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. Carissa stolonifera is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in traditional medicine as a poultice or ointment to treat various health issues.
